config.pressEnter: Press Enter to keep the current value
config.apiKeyHint: [CONFIG] The API key can be obtained at https://api.misaka.com.br
config.boolInvalid: Answer with y/yes for yes, n for no, or Enter to keep.

logs.ownerLidFailed: Could not get the owner LID.
logs.commandIgnoredNoLid: Ignored because LID could not be resolved: {{sender}}
logs.botStarted: {{botName}} started and ready to receive messages.

errors.ownerOnly: ❌ This command is only for the bot owner.
errors.groupOnly: ❌ This command can only be used in groups.
errors.privateOnly: ❌ This command can only be used in private chats.
errors.adminOnly: ❌ This command is only for group administrators.
errors.botAdminRequired: ❌ I need to be a group administrator to execute this command.
errors.commandBlocked: ❌ This command has been blocked by the bot owner.
errors.groupCommandsAdminOnly: ❌ In this group, only admins can use commands.
errors.commandExecution: ❌ An error occurred while executing the command.

errors.missingKey: API key not configured. Configure it in src/config.json
errors.rateLimit: Rate limit exceeded. Try again later

connection.sessionCleared: Local session removed. Start again to generate a new QR.
connection.qrScan: Scan with WhatsApp to connect this session.
connection.pairingInstruction: Enter in WhatsApp: Linked devices > Link a device > Link with phone number.
connection.pairingExpired: Pairing code expired. Requesting new code...

loggedOut.title: Session disconnected
loggedOut.description: WhatsApp ended this session or it was removed from connected devices.
loggedOut.action: I will clear the local session. Start again to generate a new QR.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: WhatsApp rejected the connection for this session.
forbidden.action: Check your credentials, wait a few minutes and generate a new session if it keeps failing.

connectionLost.title: Connection lost or timed out
connectionLost.description: The network dropped, fluctuated or the attempt took too long to respond.
connectionLost.action: I will try to reconnect automatically.

multideviceMismatch.title: Multi-device mismatch
multideviceMismatch.description: The session does not match the multi-device protocol expected by WhatsApp.
multideviceMismatch.action: Update Baileys/dependencies and generate a new session if necessary.

connectionClosed.title: Connection closed
connectionClosed.description: The connection was closed by WhatsApp or the network.
connectionClosed.action: I will try to reconnect automatically.

connectionReplaced.title: Connection replaced
connectionReplaced.description: Another instance connected using the same session.
connectionReplaced.action: Close the other instance before starting this one again.

badSession.title: Invalid session
badSession.description: The authentication files appear to be corrupted or invalid.
badSession.action: Delete {{authPath}} and scan a new QR code.

unavailableService.title: Service unavailable
unavailableService.description: WhatsApp or the connection route is temporarily unavailable.
unavailableService.action: I will try to reconnect automatically.

restartRequired.title: Restart required
restartRequired.description: The server requested that the client be restarted.
restartRequired.action: I will restart the connection automatically.

default.title: Connection closed
default.description: The connection was closed for an unmapped reason.
default.action: I will try to reconnect automatically.

update.failed: Update failed. Continuing with current version.

sticker.usage:
╭─「 *STICKER* 」
│
│ ✦ How to use:
│   send or reply to a photo with:
│   s
│
│   send or reply to a video with:
│   sticker
│
╰─ Result: square sticker
sticker.videoTooLong: ❌ The video must be at most {{max}} seconds.

sticker2.usage:
╭─「 *STICKER2* 」
│
│ ✦ How to use:
│   send or reply to a photo with:
│   s2
│
│   send or reply to a video with:
│   sticker2
│
╰─ Result: keeps the original format

brat.usage:
╭─「 *BRAT* 」
│
│ ✦ How to use:
│   brat <text>
│
╰─ Example:
   brat i told you
brat.empty: The API returned an empty image.

brat2.usage:
╭─「 *BRAT2* 」
│
│ ✦ How to use:
│   brat2 <text>
│
╰─ Example:
   brat2 today i disappear

play.usage:
╭─「 *PLAY* 」
│
│ ✦ Search:
│   play <song name>
│   p <song name>
│
╰─ Example:
   play michael jackson billie jean
play.author: Unknown

ytmp3.usage:
╭─「 *YTMP3* 」
│
│ ✦ Download:
│   ytmp3 <YouTube link>

╰─ Examples:
   ytmp3 https://youtube.com/watch?v=...
   ytmp3 https://youtu.be/...
   ytmp3 https://youtube.com/shorts/...
ytmp3.invalidUrl: ❌ Invalid URL. Use a YouTube link.

playvid.usage:
╭─「 *PLAYVID* 」
│
│ ✦ Search:
│   playvid <video name>
│   pv <video name>

╰─ Example:
   playvid michael jackson thriller

ytmp4.usage:
╭─「 *YTMP4* 」
│
│ ✦ Download:
│   ytmp4 <YouTube link>

╰─ Examples:
   ytmp4 https://youtube.com/watch?v=...
   ytmp4 https://youtu.be/...
   ytmp4 https://youtube.com/shorts/...
ytmp4.invalidUrl: ❌ Invalid URL. Use a YouTube link.

tiktok.usage:
╭─「 *TIKTOK* 」
│
│ ✦ Download:
│   tiktok <url>
│
│ ✦ Search:
│   tiktok <term>
│
╰─ Examples:
   tiktok https://vm.tiktok.com/...
   tiktok viral dance

instagram.invalidUrl: ❌ Invalid URL. Use an Instagram URL.

│ ✦ Search:

│

gp.usage:
╭─「 *GROUP* 」
│

╰─
gp.closed: 🔒 Group closed! Only admins can send messages.
gp.opened: 🔓 Group opened! Everyone can send messages.

legendabv.params:
@ব্যবহারকারী → ব্যবহারকারীকে মেনশন করে
│ @নাম → ব্যবহারকারীর নাম
│ @গ্রুপ → গ্রুপের নাম
│ @মোট → মোট সদস্য
│ @বিবরণ → গ্রুপের বর্ণনা

midiabv.noMedia:
╭─「 *WELCOME MEDIA* 」
│
│ ✦ স্থিতি: {{status}}

│ একটি ছবি বা ভিডিও পাঠান, অথবা তাতে reply করুন।
│ ভিডিও: সর্বোচ্চ ১৫ সেকেন্ড (gif হিসেবে পাঠানো হবে)。
সরাতে: midiabv {{off}}

╰─
midiabv.videoTooLong: ❌ The video is {{seconds}}s long. Maximum allowed: {{max}}s.

cmdnf.params:
@ব্যবহারকারী → ব্যবহারকারীকে মেনশন করে
│ @নাম → ব্যবহারকারীর নাম
│ @কমান্ড → লেখা কমান্ড
│ @মিল → সবচেয়ে কাছের কমান্ড
│ @সাদৃশ্য → মিলের শতাংশ
│ @প্রিফিক্স → বর্তমান প্রিফিক্স
│ @বট → বটের নাম

Usage: nomedono <new name>

antipv.disabled: ✅ Anti-private disabled. The bot will respond in private again.

debug.enabled: ✅ মেসেজ debug চালু হয়েছে। সব message event টার্মিনালে log হবে।

idiomagp.invalid: ❌ অবৈধ ভাষা। ব্যবহার করুন: {{optionsList}} (অথবা মূল ভাষার জন্য "{{reset}}")

soadmin.enabled: ✅ Only admins can use commands in this group now.
soadmin.disabled: ✅ Regular members can use commands in this group again.

modobn.enabled: ✅ Fun mode enabled in this group!
modobn.disabled: ❌ Fun mode disabled in this group.

setprefixgp.current:
⌨️ বর্তমান প্রিফিক্স: *{{value}}*
বিশ্বব্যাপী প্রিফিক্স: *{{global}}*

setprefixgp.reset: ✅ This group's prefix was reset to the global one (*{{value}}*).

antilink.defaultGroupText: 🚫 @ব্যবহারকারী, এই গ্রুপে গ্রুপ লিংক অনুমোদিত নয়।
antilink.defaultChannelText: 🚫 @ব্যবহারকারী, এই গ্রুপে চ্যানেল লিংক অনুমোদিত নয়।

cmdnf.defaultText:
❌ @ব্যবহারকারী, @কমান্ড কমান্ডটি নেই।

হয়তো আপনি এটি বলতে চেয়েছেন: @মিল (@সাদৃশ্য)
কমান্ডগুলো দেখতে @প্রিফিক্সmenu ব্যবহার করুন।
